requirementGroup.label: You may need one additional approved lab-based science course
requirementGroup.sourceHeading: You may need one additional approved lab-based science course (Chemistry I -TCHEM 142 or Biology I - TBIOL 120) to meet the total number of lab science credits required (18 minimum) for graduation.

beforeEnrollmentChecklist.sourceSection: You may need one additional approved lab-based science course (Chemistry I -TCHEM 142 or Biology I - TBIOL 120) to meet the total number of lab science credits required (18 minimum) for graduation.
beforeEnrollmentChecklist.reason: Parser requirement group is visible from the official UW source, but no mapped Green River course is currently available for scheduling.

beforeEnrollmentChecklist.title: **UW Tacoma students are encouraged to complete lab sciences from the following: TBIOL 110, TCHEM 105, TCHEM 131, TGEOS 117, TPHYS 121, and TPHYS 122. We do accept lab based science courses other than these options
beforeEnrollmentChecklist.note: Mapped through the official UW Green River transfer equivalency guide for TGEOS 117, TPHYS 121, TPHYS 122. No direct Green River equivalent found for TBIOL 110, TCHEM 105, TCHEM 131 in the UW-GRC equivalency guide. Equivalency rule ids: uw-grc-guide:0964:natural-science:n-sci-100-5, uw-grc-guide:1196:physics:physand-221-5-formerly-phys-201, uw-grc-guide:1197:physics:physand-222-5-formerly-phys-202.
beforeEnrollmentChecklist.sourceSection: **UW Tacoma students are encouraged to complete lab sciences from the following: TBIOL 110, TCHEM 105, TCHEM 131, TGEOS 117, TPHYS 121, and TPHYS 122. We do accept lab based science courses other than these options.
beforeEnrollmentChecklist.reason: Generated from parser-backed Tacoma SET requirements and UW-GRC equivalency rules.

beforeEnrollmentChecklist.title: Introduction to Programming (TCSS 142 or equivalent)
beforeEnrollmentChecklist.note: Mapped through the official UW Green River transfer equivalency guide for TCSS 142. Equivalency rule ids: uw-grc-guide:0266:computer-science:cs-121-5.
beforeEnrollmentChecklist.reason: Generated from parser-backed Tacoma SET requirements and UW-GRC equivalency rules.

beforeEnrollmentChecklist.title: Object-Oriented Programming (TCSS 143 or equivalent)
beforeEnrollmentChecklist.note: Mapped through the official UW Green River transfer equivalency guide for TCSS 143. Equivalency rule ids: uw-grc-guide:0277:computer-science:cs-145-5-formerly-c-sci-145.
beforeEnrollmentChecklist.reason: Generated from parser-backed Tacoma SET requirements and UW-GRC equivalency rules.

beforeEnrollmentChecklist.title: TMATH 126 Calculus with Analytic Geometry III
